title: Lift assist mechanism for overhead bin
abstract: A pivot bin assembly that includes an upper housing having a top and first and second housing side walls that each include a lower edge, a bucket that cooperates with the upper housing to define a bin interior and a first compression member. The bucket includes a bottom and first and second bucket side walls that each include an upper edge and pivots with respect to the upper housing between open and closed positions. The first housing side wall and the first bucket side wall cooperate to define a first compression member opening where the first compression member is positioned. The first compression member includes a main body portion having a plurality of cells that are defined by a plurality of sidewalls. The plurality of cells are comprised of a compliant material that compresses as the bucket moves to the open position to provide dampening and expands as the bucket moves to the closed position to provide lift assist.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A pivot bin assembly comprising: an upper housing that includes a top and first and second housing side walls that each include a lower edge, a bucket that cooperates with the upper housing to define a bin interior, wherein the bucket includes a bottom and first and second bucket side walls that each include an upper edge, wherein the bucket pivots with respect to the upper housing between an open position and a closed position, wherein the first housing side wall and the first bucket side wall cooperate to define a first compression member opening, and a first compression member positioned in the first compression member opening, wherein the first compression member includes a main body portion that includes a plurality of cells that are defined by a plurality of sidewalls, wherein the plurality of cells are comprised of a compliant material that compresses as the bucket moves to the open position to provide dampening and expands as the bucket moves to the closed position to provide lift assist. 2. The pivot bin assembly of claim 1 wherein the first compression member generally forms a wedge shape. 3. The pivot bin assembly of claim 2 wherein the first compression member has a front and a back and the front is positioned closer to a pivot axis of the bucket, wherein the back has a greater height dimension that the front. 4. The pivot bin assembly of claim 1 wherein the plurality of cells define a first set of cells and a second set of cells, wherein the first set of cells are a first shape and the 

 second set of cells are a second shape, wherein the first shape is different than the second shape. 5. The pivot bin assembly of claim 4 wherein the cells in the first set of cells are square, and wherein the cells in the second set of cells are not square. 6. The pivot bin assembly of claim 5 wherein the cells in the second set of cells are octagonal. 7. The pivot bin assembly of claim 4 wherein at least some of the cells in the first set of cells and at least some of the cells in the second set of cells include shared sidewalls. 8. The pivot bin assembly of claim 4 wherein the first compression member generally forms a wedge shape. 9. The pivot bin assembly of claim 1 wherein the plurality of cells define a first set of cells and a second set of cells, wherein the first set of cells are a first size and the second set of cells are a second size, wherein the first size is different than the second size. 10. The pivot bin assembly of claim 9 wherein the first set of cells and the second set of cells are the same shape. 11. The pivot bin assembly of claim 1 wherein the plurality of cells define a first set of cells and a second set of cells, wherein the first set of cells comprise a first material and 

 the second set of cells comprise a second material, wherein the first material has a different density that the second material. 12. The pivot bin assembly of claim 1 wherein the plurality of cells define a first section with a first spring constant and a second section with a second spring constant, wherein the first spring constant is different than the second spring constant. 13. The pivot bin assembly of claim 1 wherein the first compression member comprises a polymer. 14. The pivot bin assembly of claim 1 further comprising a first hinge system that includes a first hinge assembly having an outer race, an inner race, and a plurality of bearings disposed between the outer race and the inner race, wherein the first housing side wall and the first bucket side wall cooperate to define a first hinge assembly opening, wherein the first hinge assembly is positioned in the first hinge assembly opening. 15. The pivot bin assembly of claim 14 wherein the first hinge system includes an inner cover having an inner surface and an outer surface, and an outer cover having an inner surface and an outer surface, wherein an inner pivot member extends inwardly from the inner surface of the inner cover, wherein an outer pivot member extends inwardly from the inner surface of the outer cover, wherein the inner and outer pivot members are positioned in the central opening of the inner race to form a pivot axle. 16. The pivot bin assembly of claim 15 wherein the inner cover includes a hinge portion and a lift assist portion, wherein the outer cover includes a hinge portion and a lift assist portion, wherein at least a portion of the hinge assembly opening is defined between the hinge portions of the inner and outer covers, and wherein at least a portion of the 

 compression member opening is defined between the lift assist portions of the inner and outer covers. 17. A pivot bin assembly comprising: an upper housing that includes a top and first and second housing side walls that each include a lower edge, a bucket that cooperates with the upper housing to define a bin interior, wherein the bucket includes a bottom and first and second bucket side walls that each include an upper edge, wherein the bucket pivots with respect to the upper housing between an open position and a closed position, wherein the first housing side wall and the first bucket side wall cooperate to define a first compression member opening, and a first compression member positioned in the first compression member opening, wherein the first compression member includes a main body portion that includes a plurality of cells that are defined by a plurality of sidewalls, wherein the plurality of cells are comprised of a compliant material that compresses as the bucket moves to the open position to provide dampening and expands as the bucket moves to the closed position to provide lift assist, wherein the first compression member generally forms a wedge shape, wherein the first compression member has a front and a back and the front is positioned closer to a pivot axis of the bucket, wherein the back has a greater height dimension that the front, wherein the plurality of cells define a first set of cells and a second set of cells, wherein the first set of cells are a first shape and the second set of cells are a second shape, wherein the first shape is different than the second shape, and wherein at least some of the cells in the first set of cells and at least some of the cells in the second set of cells include shared sidewalls. 18. The pivot bin assembly of claim 17 wherein the first compression member comprises a polymer. 19. The pivot bin assembly of claim 18 wherein the cells in the first set of cells are square, and wherein the cells in the second set of cells are octagonal.
